youth_sports_governance.name: Ministry Leadership & Governance
youth_sports_governance.description: Governance of the Youth and Sports Development sector. Includes Ministry policies, Minister's activities, sports federation elections, and administrative decisions.

youth_affairs_core.name: Youth Affairs Core Issues
youth_affairs_core.description: General issues affecting the youth demographic. Includes youth demographics, 'Not Too Young To Run', youth inclusion in governance, and national youth conferences.

youth_employment_empowerment.name: Youth Employment, Skills & Empowerment
youth_employment_empowerment.description: Economic opportunities for youth. Covers unemployment, N-Power, skills acquisition programs, tech empowerment, entrepreneurship grants, and job creation.

youth_education_nysc.name: Education to Employment & NYSC
youth_education_nysc.description: Transition from school to work and National Youth Service Corps. Includes NYSC orientation camps, PPA (Place of Primary Assignment), corpers' allowance (allawee), and graduate employability.

youth_protests_activism.name: Youth Protests, Activism & Movements
youth_protests_activism.description: Youth-led social movements and demonstrations. Includes EndSARS, protests against police brutality, student protests, and online activism.

youth_social_risks.name: Mental Health, Drugs & Social Risks
youth_social_risks.description: Social challenges facing youth. Includes drug abuse (Codeine, Tramadol, Mkpuru Mmiri), cybercrime (Yahoo Yahoo), cultism, and mental health struggles.

sports_national_international.name: Sports: National & International
sports_national_international.description: General participation in major sporting events. Includes Olympics, Commonwealth Games, All Africa Games, and National Sports Festival.

football_high_sensitivity.name: Football: High Sensitivity Area
football_high_sensitivity.description: Football-specific discussions, which are highly emotional in Nigeria. Covers Super Eagles, Super Falcons, NFF (Nigeria Football Federation), World Cup qualifiers, AFCON, and local leagues (NPFL).

other_major_sports.name: Other Major Sports
other_major_sports.description: Non-football sports with significant following. Includes Basketball (D'Tigress/D'Tigers), Athletics (Track & Field), Boxing, and Table Tennis.

sports_infrastructure.name: Sports Infrastructure & Facilities
sports_infrastructure.description: State of stadiums and training facilities. Includes National Stadium Lagos/Abuja, decaying infrastructure, pitch conditions, and renovation projects.

sports_funding_integrity.name: Sports Funding, Governance & Integrity
sports_funding_integrity.description: Financial management in sports. Covers corruption allegations, funding for tournaments, unpaid match bonuses, and leadership tussles in federations.

athletes_officials_welfare.name: Athletes, Coaches & Officials
athletes_officials_welfare.description: Welfare of sports personnel. Includes hiring/firing of coaches (e.g., Super Eagles coach), player welfare, and treatment of athletes.

fan_sentiment_risk.name: Fan Sentiment, Violence & Matchday Risks
fan_sentiment_risk.description: Crowd behavior and safety. Includes stadium violence, hooliganism, pitch invasion, and angry fan reactions.

youth_digital_trends.name: Social Media & Influencer Monitoring
youth_digital_trends.description: Youth culture on digital platforms. Includes trends on Twitter/X, TikTok, influential voices, and viral challenges.

youth_media_reputation.name: Media Reputation & Crisis Signals
youth_media_reputation.description: Public perception of the ministry/minister in media. Includes press releases, controversies, and viral negative stories.

youth_regional_demographics.name: Regional & Demographic Signals
youth_regional_demographics.description: Youth issues specific to regions (North vs South) or demographics (Rural vs Urban youth).

youth_future_trends.name: Future Facing & Strategic Signals
youth_future_trends.description: Emerging long-term issues for youth. Includes future of work, tech adoption, and generational shifts (Gen Z).

youth_early_warning.name: Early Warning & Escalation Keywords
youth_early_warning.description: Keywords indicating imminent youth unrest or crisis. Includes mobilization for protests, threats of violence, or hashtags calling for action.
